## TRM1.3. Adherence to ATFM slots (PI#1) {#trm1.3.-adherence-to-atfm-slots-pi1 .Heading-2-TZ}

ATFM slot adherence in 2025 was equal to 91.7%, very close to 2024 value -- last year of RP3 -- of 91.2%. With regard to the 8.3% of flights that did not adhere, 4.7% were early and 3.6% were late.

Most of the airports above 20,000 IFR departures showed adherence above 90%; only Nice, Marseille and Lyon present values between 85% and 90%. All airports with traffic up to 20,000 IFR departures (including Paris Beauvais) showed a 100% adherence.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of ATFM slot adherence across Member States in 2025 was 96.1%.
